question: How can you install the handset of a landline?
content:
1. The handset batteries are pre-installed. Pull the battery tape out from the battery door before charging, as shown by the tab being removed from the handset.<PIC>
2. Place the handset on the base station to charge it. When it is placed correctly, you hear a docking sound and the handset starts charging.
3. Charge the batteries for 8 hours before first use. Use only the supplied batteries, keep batteries away from heat, sunshine, and fire, and check polarity if you ever insert batteries in the compartment.
ret: "1. The handset batteries are pre-installed. Pull the battery tape out from the battery door before charging, as shown by the tab being removed from the handset.<PIC>\n2. Place the handset on the base station to charge it. When it is placed correctly, you hear a docking sound and the handset starts charging.\n3. Charge the batteries for 8 hours before first use. Use only the supplied batteries, keep batteries away from heat, sunshine, and fire, and check polarity if you ever insert batteries in the compartment.",["Manual22_23"]
notes: Grounded in the Install the handset and Charge the handset sections. Manual22_23 is used because it shows pulling the battery tape from the handset; the nearby charge-handset note image was not useful as visual evidence.
